steps.title: Check a small positive value
steps.content:
At $x=1$, compare the two expressions.
$$3^1=3$$
$$3(1)+3=6$$
So $3^x\lt3x+3$ for this small positive value.

steps.title: Check a larger value
steps.content:
At $x=3$, compare again.
$$3^3=27$$
$$3(3)+3=12$$
So $3^x\gt3x+3$ for this larger value.

steps.title: Describe the changeover
steps.content: The exponential expression is less at first and greater later, so there is a changeover value $c$ with the stated before and after behavior. The answer is C.
